summary.en: Serbian EV charging projects typically require site and charging-service review through AERS and EMS procedures when connected to public networks or grid-connected assets. This includes power interconnection, protection settings, remote monitoring interfaces, metering logic, energization, commissioning, and tariff/compliance reporting.
summary.zh: 塞尔维亚电动出行项目通常在接入公共网络或并网资产时，需要通过AERS与EMS流程进行站点和充电服务审查，包括并网、保护参数、远程监控接口、计量逻辑、送电、调试和电价/合规报送。
summary.zht: 塞爾維亞電動出行項目通常在接入公共網路或併網資產時，需要透過AERS與EMS流程進行場站和充電服務審查，包括併網、保護參數、遠端監控介面、計量邏輯、送電、調試及電價/合規報送。

standards_or_laws: AERS charging-site and grid-connection obligations where applicable
EMS distribution-level connection and acceptance requirements

summary.en: China chargers may include GB/T 18487 reports and domestic dispatch-site review documents. These are useful for technical mapping, but they do not replace Serbian AERS or EMS site connection obligations for charging assets.
summary.zh: 中国充电桩可附带GB/T 18487报告及国内调度或场站审查文件。其有助于技术映射，但不能替代塞尔维亚AERS或EMS对充电资产的现场并网义务。
summary.zht: 中國充電樁可附帶GB/T 18487報告及國內調度或場站審查文件。其有助於技術映射，但不能替代塞爾維亞AERS或EMS對充電資產的現場併網義務。

standards_or_laws: China charging network approval and dispatch procedures where applicable

gap.en: The gap is Serbia project approval context. Exporters should provide EMS route mapping, site electrical project files, grid studies, protection matrices, telemetry plan, commissioning logs, ownership of operation responsibilities, and Serbian-language acceptance checklists.
gap.zh: 差距在于塞尔维亚项目批准背景。出口商应提供EMS路径映射、现场电气项目文件、电网研究、保护矩阵、遥测方案、调试日志、运维责任归属和塞尔维亚语验收清单。
gap.zht: 差距在於塞爾維亞項目批准背景。出口商應提供EMS路徑映射、現場電氣項目文件、電網研究、保護矩陣、遙測方案、調試日誌、維運責任歸屬及塞爾維亞語驗收清單。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for projects requiring charging-network connection and EMS acceptance; often mandatory in public or utility-linked deployments
mandatory_status.cn: China project acceptance documents do not transfer to Serbian grid or service operation rights

source.publisher: Energy Agency of the Republic of Serbia (AERS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat EV charger grid-test evidence as a full Serbian market decision. Confirm AERS route, EMS project connection path, and operator acceptance evidence before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将EV充电桩的电网测试证据视为塞尔维亚完整市场准入结论。应在调试前确认AERS路径、EMS项目并网路径及运营方验收证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將EV充電樁的電網測試證據視為塞爾維亞完整市場准入結論。應在調試前確認AERS路徑、EMS項目併網路徑及營運方驗收證據。
